heading: Basis to corporations
label: 362 Basis to corporations

children.heading: Property acquired by issuance of stock or as paid-in surplus
children.label: a Property acquired by issuance of stock or as paid-in surplus

children.text: in connection with a transaction to which section 351 (relating to transfer of property to corporation controlled by transferor) applies, or
as paid-in surplus or as a contribution to capital,

children.heading: Transfers to corporations
children.label: b Transfers to corporations
children.text: If property was acquired by a corporation in connection with a reorganization to which this part applies, then the basis shall be the same as it would be in the hands of the transferor, increased in the amount of gain recognized to the transferor on such transfer. This subsection shall not apply if the property acquired consists of stock or securities in a corporation a party to the reorganization, unless acquired by the exchange of stock or securities of the transferee (or of a corporation which is in control of the transferee) as the consideration in whole or in part for the transfer.

children.heading: Special rule for certain contributions to capital
children.label: c Special rule for certain contributions to capital
A
children.text: is acquired by a corporation as a contribution to capital, and

children.label: B
children.text: is not contributed by a shareholder as such,

children.label: A
children.text: is received by a corporation as a contribution to capital, and

children.label: B
children.text: is not contributed by a shareholder as such,

children.heading: Limitation on basis increase attributable to assumption of liability
children.label: d Limitation on basis increase attributable to assumption of liability

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In no event shall the basis of any property be increased under subsection (a) or (b) above the fair market value of such property (determined without regard to section 7701(g)) by reason of any gain recognized to the transferor as a result of the assumption of a liability.

children.heading: Treatment of gain not subject to tax
children.label: 2 Treatment of gain not subject to tax
A
children.text: gain is recognized to the transferor as a result of an assumption of a nonrecourse liability by a transferee which is also secured by assets not transferred to such transferee; and

children.label: B
children.text: no person is subject to tax under this title on such gain,

children.heading: Limitation on importation of built-in losses
children.label: 1 Limitation on importation of built-in losses

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If in any transaction described in subsection (a) or (b) there would (but for this subsection) be an importation of a net built-in loss, the basis of each property described in subparagraph (B) which is acquired in such transaction shall (notwithstanding subsections (a) and (b)) be its fair market value immediately after such transaction.

children.label: i
children.text: gain or loss with respect to such property is not subject to tax under this subtitle in the hands of the transferor immediately before the transfer, and

children.label: ii
children.text: gain or loss with respect to such property is subject to such tax in the hands of the transferee immediately after such transfer.

children.heading: Importation of net built-in loss
children.label: C Importation of net built-in loss
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), there is an importation of a net built-in loss in a transaction if the transferee’s aggregate adjusted bases of property described in subparagraph (B) which is transferred in such transaction would (but for this paragraph) exceed the fair market value of such property immediately after such transaction.

children.heading: Limitation on transfer of built-in losses in section 351 transactions
children.label: 2 Limitation on transfer of built-in losses in section 351 transactions
i
children.text: property is transferred by a transferor in any transaction which is described in subsection (a) and which is not described in paragraph (1) of this subsection, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the transferee’s aggregate adjusted bases of such property so transferred would (but for this paragraph) exceed the fair market value of such property immediately after such transaction,

children.heading: Allocation of basis reduction
children.label: B Allocation of basis reduction
children.text: The aggregate reduction in basis by reason of subparagraph (A) shall be allocated among the property so transferred in proportion to their respective built-in losses immediately before the transaction.

children.heading: Election to apply limitation to transferor’s stock basis
children.label: C Election to apply limitation to transferor’s stock basis
I
children.text: subparagraph (A) shall not apply, and

children.label: II
children.text: the transferor’s basis in the stock received for property to which subparagraph (A) does not apply by reason of the election shall not exceed its fair market value immediately after the transfer.

children.heading: Election
children.label: ii Election
children.text: Any election under clause (i) shall be made at such time and in such form and manner as the Secretary may prescribe, and, once made, shall be irrevocable.
